svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="h3_algorithm_flowchart" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-545" dy="-444" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="#FFFFFF" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="n1" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="BẮT ĐẦU" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="440" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;" value="Khởi tạo Actor μ<sub>i</sub>, Critic Q<sub>i</sub>, mạng target,
buffer 𝒟; λ ← 1,0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="440" x="300" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;" value="Warmup: 5 000 bước hành động ngẫu nhiên → 𝒟" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="440" x="300" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n4" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;" value="Vòng episode
e = 1 … E (E = 2000)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="320" x="360" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n15" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="KẾT THÚC
Trả về μ<sub>θ0</sub>, μ<sub>θ1</sub>, μ<sub>θ2</sub>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="780" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;" value="Lấy mẫu kênh mới h<sub>d,k</sub>, G, h<sub>r,k</sub>; reset trạng thái" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="440" x="300" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n6" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;" value="Vòng bước
t = 1 … T (T = 50)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="320" x="360" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n7" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;" value="Tính pha tiên nghiệm θ<sub>prior</sub> từ kênh" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="440" x="300" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F2F2F2;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;" value="Sinh hành động a<sub>i</sub> = μ<sub>i</sub>(o<sub>i</sub>) + noise OU
Ánh xạ vật lý: θ = θ<sub>prior</sub> + (π/4)·Δφ; softmax công suất" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="480" x="280" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n9" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;" value="Thực thi: tính h<sub>eff</sub>, SINR, R<sub>k</sub>, R<sub>sum</sub> → phần thưởng r<sub>t</sub>
Lưu (o, a, r, o′) vào 𝒟" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="440" x="300" y="910" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n10" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F2F2F2;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;" value="Nếu |𝒟| > B: lấy mini-batch → cập nhật Critic (Bellman)
→ Actor (DPG) → soft-update target (τ = 0,005)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="480" x="280" y="1020" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n12" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;" value="Tính ρ<sub>QoS</sub> của episode" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="440" x="300" y="1140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n13" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1F4E79;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="e &lt; 0,55·E ?
(0,55·E = 1100)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="320" x="360" y="1230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n13a" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;" value="Cập nhật λ thích nghi:
×1,02 nếu ρ<sub>QoS</sub> &lt; 0,5 · ×0,97 nếu ρ<sub>QoS</sub> &gt; 0,6
kẹp [0,3; 13]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="330" x="40" y="1385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n13b" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1F4E79;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1F4E79;" value="ĐÓNG BĂNG λ
(giữ nguyên giá trị)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="680" y="1390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n14" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=13;" value="Giảm σ noise (tuyến tính, sàn tại ep ≈ 900)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="440" x="300" y="1510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="pha thích nghi" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="225" y="1335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="pha đóng băng" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="130" x="840" y="1335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="n1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;endArrow=classic;endSize=6;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="n2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="n2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;endArrow=classic;endSize=6;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="n3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="n3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;endArrow=classic;endSize=6;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="n4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="n4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;endArrow=classic;endSize=6;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;"
